text: I'm Mark, and these are One Minute Phrases.

And today's phrase is, "I've got to go."
" I've got to go."
"I've got to go. I have to go now."
"Oh, look at the time. I've got to go."
"Sorry, I can't stop to talk. I've got to go."
"My door is open. I've got to go."
"I have to go to work. I've got to go."
"Oh no, I'm late for work. I've got to go."
"I've got to go for obligation."
Obligation.
"I have to pickup my kids. I've got to go."
"Oh no, I've got a doctor's appointment. I've got to go."
"My wife told me to take out the trash. I've got to go."
"I need to meet my wife. I've got to go."
"I've got to go now!"
